name: Sam Tallent
bio: Sam Tallent is an American stand-up comedian, novelist, and podcaster from Elizabeth, Colorado, known for dark, surreal, road-comic material and a heavy national and international touring schedule. His 2020 novel Running the Light became a cult favorite about the life of a touring comedian and was optioned for film. He has released the specials Waiting For Death to Claim Us and The Toad's Morale and hosts the Chubby Behemoth podcast with Nathan Lund.

timeline.ev: Named to Just for Laughs New Faces
Publishes the novel Running the Light
Releases special Waiting For Death to Claim Us
Performs new special The Toad's Morale
Signs with Random House to republish Running the Light

accolades: Acclaimed debut novel Running the Light (2020)

specials.t: Waiting For Death to Claim Us
